case_title: CHIEF,DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. H & K ENTERPRISES,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF,DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT H & K ENTERPRISES,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA BODEGA BISTRO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
